_comment: Custom Pterodactyl egg for OskarLink. Generated from upload-to-github/OskarLink.
name: OskarLink
author: oskar.trzaskawka@oskarlink.dev
description: OskarLink is a private Lavalink-compatible audio node distribution by Oskar Trzaskawka with a pinned, conflict-aware plugin stack and broad yt-dlp source coverage.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

printf '%s\n' '[OskarLink] Installing packages'
apt-get update -qq >/dev/null
apt-get install -y -qq curl ca-certificates >/dev/null

cd /mnt/server
mkdir -p plugins logs bin

if [ "${CLEAN_PLUGIN_JARS:-true}" = 'true' ]; then
  printf '%s\n' '[OskarLink] Cleaning stale plugin jars'
  find ./plugins -maxdepth 1 -type f -name '*.jar' -delete
fi

version="${LAVALINK_VERSION:-4.2.2}"
if [ -n "${OSKARLINK_JAR_URL:-}" ]; then
  lavalink_url="${OSKARLINK_JAR_URL}"
elif [ "$version" = 'latest' ]; then
  lavalink_url='https://github.com/lavalink-devs/Lavalink/releases/latest/download/Lavalink.jar'
else
  lavalink_url="https://github.com/lavalink-devs/Lavalink/releases/download/${version}/Lavalink.jar"
fi

printf '%s\n' "[OskarLink] Downloading Lavalink core (${version})"
curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 "$lavalink_url" -o OskarLink.jar

arch="$(uname -m)"
case "$arch" in
  x86_64|amd64) ytdlp_asset='yt-dlp_linux' ;;
  aarch64|arm64) ytdlp_asset='yt-dlp_linux_aarch64' ;;
  *) ytdlp_asset='yt-dlp' ;;
esac

printf '%s\n' '[OskarLink] Installing yt-dlp helper'
curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 "https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/releases/latest/download/${ytdlp_asset}" -o ./bin/yt-dlp
chmod +x ./bin/yt-dlp

if [ ! -f application.yml ]; then
  if [ -n "${OSKARLINK_CONFIG_URL:-}" ]; then
    printf '%s\n' '[OskarLink] Downloading application.yml from OSKARLINK_CONFIG_URL'
    curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 "${OSKARLINK_CONFIG_URL}" -o application.yml
  elif [ -n "${OSKARLINK_RAW_BASE_URL:-}" ]; then
    printf '%s\n' '[OskarLink] Downloading application.yml from OSKARLINK_RAW_BASE_URL'
    curl -fL --retry 5 --retry-delay 2 "${OSKARLINK_RAW_BASE_URL%/}/config/application.example.yml" -o application.yml
  else
    printf '%s\n' '[OskarLink] Writing embedded application.yml'
    cat > application.yml <<'YAML'
server:
  port: 2333
  address: 0.0.0.0
  http2:
    enabled: false
  compression:
    enabled: true
    mime-types: application/json,text/plain
  tomcat:
    connection-timeout: 30s
    accept-count: 200
    threads:
      min-spare: 16
      max: 256

spring:
  main:
    banner-mode: "off"
  lifecycle:
    timeout-per-shutdown-phase: 30s
  mvc:
    async:
      request-timeout: 45s
  codec:
    max-in-memory-size: 16MB

management:
  endpoints:
    web:
      exposure:
        include: health,info,metrics,prometheus
  endpoint:
    health:
      probes:
        enabled: true
      show-details: never
  metrics:
    tags:
      application: oskarlink

lavalink:
  plugins:
    - dependency: "dev.lavalink.youtube:youtube-plugin:1.18.1"
      repository: "https://maven.lavalink.dev/releases"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.topi314.lavasrc:lavasrc-plugin:4.8.3"
      repository: "https://maven.lavalink.dev/releases"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "io.github.lavalink-addons:lavasrc-failover-plugin:1.1.3"
      repository: "https://repo1.maven.org/maven2"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.topi314.lavasearch:lavasearch-plugin:1.0.0"
      repository: "https://maven.lavalink.dev/releases"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.topi314.lavalyrics:lavalyrics-plugin:1.1.0"
      repository: "https://maven.lavalink.dev/releases"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.topi314.sponsorblock:sponsorblock-plugin:3.0.1"
      repository: "https://maven.lavalink.dev/releases"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.Devoxin:LavaDSPX-Plugin:0.0.5"
      repository: "https://jitpack.io"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.Myxelium:Jellylink:v0.2.1"
      repository: "https://jitpack.io"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.dubistmutig:discovery-go:0.1.0"
      repository: "https://jitpack.io"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "com.github.ParrotXray:lavabili-plugin:1.3.1"
      repository: "https://jitpack.io"
      snapshot: false
    - dependency: "net.esmbot:lava-xm-plugin:0.2.8"
      repository: "https://repo.projectlounge.pw/maven/releases"
      snapshot: false
  pluginsDir: "./plugins"
  defaultPluginRepository: "https://maven.lavalink.dev/releases"
  defaultPluginSnapshotRepository: "https://maven.lavalink.dev/snapshots"
  server:
    password: "${LAVALINK_PASSWORD:youshallnotpass}"
    sources:
      youtube: false
      bandcamp: true
      soundcloud: true
      twitch: true
      vimeo: true
      nico: true
      http: ${ENABLE_HTTP_SOURCE:true}
      local: ${ENABLE_LOCAL_SOURCE:false}
    filters:
      volume: true
      equalizer: true
      karaoke: true
      timescale: true
      tremolo: true
      vibrato: true
      distortion: true
      rotation: true
      channelMix: true
      lowPass: true
    nonAllocatingFrameBuffer: true
    bufferDurationMs: 2000
    frameBufferDurationMs: 12000
    opusEncodingQuality: 10
    resamplingQuality: HIGH
    trackStuckThresholdMs: 30000
    useSeekGhosting: true
    youtubePlaylistLoadLimit: 12
    playerUpdateInterval: 5
    youtubeSearchEnabled: true
    soundcloudSearchEnabled: true
    soundcloudFilterOutPreviewTracks: true
    gc-warnings: true
    ratelimit:
      ipBlocks: []
      excludedIps: []
      strategy: "RotateOnBan"
      searchTriggersFail: true
      retryLimit: 5
    timeouts:
      connectTimeoutMs: 10000
      connectionRequestTimeoutMs: 10000
      socketTimeoutMs: 10000

plugins:
  youtube:
    enabled: true
    allowSearch: true
    allowDirectVideoIds: true
    allowDirectPlaylistIds: true
    clients:
      - TV
      - TVHTML5_SIMPLY
      - ANDROID_VR
      - ANDROID_MUSIC
      - IOS
      - WEB
      - MWEB
      - WEBEMBEDDED
      - MUSIC
    clientOptions:
      TV:
        playback: true
        playlistLoading: false
        searching: false
        videoLoading: true
      TVHTML5_SIMPLY:
        playback: true
        playlistLoading: false
        searching: false
        videoLoading: true
      ANDROID_VR:
        playback: true
        playlistLoading: true
        searching: true
        videoLoading: true
      ANDROID_MUSIC:
        playback: true
        playlistLoading: true
        searching: true
        videoLoading: true
      IOS:
        playback: true
        playlistLoading: true
        searching: true
        videoLoading: true
      WEB:
        playback: false
        playlistLoading: true
        searching: true
        videoLoading: true
      MWEB:
        playback: false
        playlistLoading: true
        searching: true
        videoLoading: true
      WEBEMBEDDED:
        playback: true
        playlistLoading: false
        searching: false
        videoLoading: true
      MUSIC:
        playback: false
        playlistLoading: false
        searching: true
        videoLoading: false
    oauth:
      enabled: ${YOUTUBE_OAUTH_ENABLED:false}
      refreshToken: "${YOUTUBE_OAUTH_REFRESH_TOKEN:}"
      skipInitialization: true
    pot:
      token: "${YOUTUBE_POT_TOKEN:}"
      visitorData: "${YOUTUBE_VISITOR_DATA:}"
    # Enable only when you run a trusted yt-cipher server.
    # remoteCipher:
    #   url: "${YOUTUBE_REMOTE_CIPHER_URL:}"
    #   password: "${YOUTUBE_REMOTE_CIPHER_PASSWORD:}"
    #   userAgent: "OskarLink"

  lavasrc:
    providers:
      - "qbisrc:%ISRC%"
      - "ytsearch:\"%ISRC%\""
      - "ytmsearch:\"%ISRC%\""
      - "qbsearch:%QUERY%"
      - "tdsearch:%QUERY%"
      - "amsearch:%QUERY%"
      - "spsearch:%QUERY%"
      - "ymsearch:%QUERY%"
      - "vksearch:%QUERY%"
      - "ytsearch:%QUERY%"
      - "ytmsearch:%QUERY%"
      - "scsearch:%QUERY%"
    sources:
      spotify: ${ENABLE_SPOTIFY:false}
      applemusic: ${ENABLE_APPLE_MUSIC:false}
      deezer: ${ENABLE_DEEZER:false}
      yandexmusic: ${ENABLE_YANDEX_MUSIC:false}
      vkmusic: ${ENABLE_VK_MUSIC:false}
      tidal: ${ENABLE_TIDAL:false}
      qobuz: ${ENABLE_QOBUZ:false}
      ytdlp: true
      flowerytts: ${ENABLE_FLOWERY_TTS:true}
      youtube: true
      jiosaavn: ${ENABLE_JIOSAAVN:false}
    lyrics-sources:
      spotify: ${ENABLE_SPOTIFY:false}
      deezer: ${ENABLE_DEEZER:false}
      youtube: true
      yandexmusic: ${ENABLE_YANDEX_MUSIC:false}
      vkmusic: ${ENABLE_VK_MUSIC:false}
      lrcLib: true
    spotify:
      clientId: "${SPOTIFY_CLIENT_ID:}"
      clientSecret: "${SPOTIFY_CLIENT_SECRET:}"
      spDc: "${SPOTIFY_SP_DC:}"
      countryCode: "${MUSIC_COUNTRY:US}"
      playlistLoadLimit: 10
      albumLoadLimit: 10
      resolveArtistsInSearch: false
      localFiles: false
      preferPartnerApi: false
      preferV1SearchApi: false
      customTokenEndpoint: "${SPOTIFY_CUSTOM_TOKEN_ENDPOINT:}"
    applemusic:
      countryCode: "${MUSIC_COUNTRY:US}"
      mediaAPIToken: "${APPLE_MUSIC_TOKEN:}"
      playlistLoadLimit: 10
      albumLoadLimit: 10
    deezer:
      masterDecryptionKey: "${DEEZER_MASTER_KEY:}"
      arl: "${DEEZER_ARL:}"
      formats: [ "FLAC", "MP3_320", "MP3_256", "MP3_128", "MP3_64", "AAC_64" ]
    yandexmusic:
      accessToken: "${YANDEX_ACCESS_TOKEN:}"
      playlistLoadLimit: 15
      albumLoadLimit: 15
      artistLoadLimit: 15
    vkmusic:
      userToken: "${VK_USER_TOKEN:}"
      playlistLoadLimit: 10
      artistLoadLimit: 10
      recommendationsLoadLimit: 50
    tidal:
      countryCode: "${MUSIC_COUNTRY:US}"
      searchLimit: 6
      token: "${TIDAL_TOKEN:}"
    qobuz:
      userOauthToken: "${QOBUZ_USER_OAUTH_TOKEN:}"
    jiosaavn:
      decryption:
        secretKey: "${JIOSAAVN_SECRET:}"
    ytdlp:
      path: "./bin/yt-dlp"
      searchLimit: 15
      mixPlaylistLoadLimit: 25
      playlistLoadLimit: 1000
      customLoadArgs:
        - "-q"
        - "--no-warnings"
        - "--flat-playlist"
        - "--skip-download"
        - "-J"
      customPlaybackArgs:
        - "-q"
        - "--no-warnings"
        - "-f"
        - "bestaudio"
        - "-J"
    flowerytts:
      voice: "default voice"
      translate: false
      silence: 0
      speed: 1.0
      audioFormat: "mp3"
    youtube:
      countryCode: "${MUSIC_COUNTRY:US}"
      language: "en"

  lavalyrics:
    sources:
      - youtube
      - lrcLib
      - spotify
      - deezer
      - yandexMusic
      - vkMusic

  sponsorblock:
    enabled: true

  failover:
    enabled: true
    logLevel: INFO
    failureThreshold: 3
    endpointEnabled: true
    endpointPath: /v4/failover/health

  jellylink:
    enabled: ${ENABLE_JELLYLINK:false}
    server: "${JELLYFIN_SERVER:}"
    username: "${JELLYFIN_USERNAME:}"
    password: "${JELLYFIN_PASSWORD:}"
    searchPrefix: "jfsearch"

  discovery-go:
    enabled: ${ENABLE_DISCOVERY_GO:false}
    soundcloudOAuthToken: "${SOUNDCLOUD_OAUTH_TOKEN:}"

  lavabili:
    enabled: ${ENABLE_LAVABILI:true}
    allowSearch: true
    playlistPageCount: -1
    auth:
      enabled: ${BILIBILI_AUTH_ENABLED:false}
      sessdata: "${BILIBILI_SESSDATA:}"
      biliJct: "${BILIBILI_BILI_JCT:}"
      buvid3: "${BILIBILI_BUVID3:}"

metrics:
  prometheus:
    enabled: ${ENABLE_PROMETHEUS:true}
    endpoint: /metrics

sentry:
  dsn: "${SENTRY_DSN:}"
  environment: "${SENTRY_ENVIRONMENT:production}"

logging:
  file:
    path: ./logs/
    max-history: 14
    max-size: 100MB
  level:
    root: INFO
    lavalink: INFO
    lavalink.server.io.SocketContext: OFF
    com.sedmelluq.discord.lavaplayer.tools.ExceptionTools: OFF
    com.sedmelluq.discord.lavaplayer.tools.io.PersistentHttpStream: OFF
    com.sedmelluq.discord.lavaplayer.source.youtube.YoutubePersistentHttpStream: OFF
    dev.lavalink.youtube.YoutubeAudioSourceManager: INFO
    dev.lavalink.youtube.http.YoutubeOauth2Handler: INFO
    com.github.topi314.lavasrc: INFO
    com.github.topi314.lavasearch: INFO
    com.github.topi314.lavalyrics: INFO
    com.github.topi314.sponsorblock: INFO
    io.github.lavalinkaddons: INFO
    dev.lavalink.failover: INFO
    me.devoxin: INFO
  request:
    enabled: true
    includeClientInfo: true
    includeHeaders: false
    includeQueryString: true
    includePayload: false
    maxPayloadLength: 10000
    beforeRequest: false
  logback:
    rollingpolicy:
      max-file-size: 100MB
      max-history: 14
YAML
  fi
else
  printf '%s\n' '[OskarLink] Keeping existing application.yml'
fi

cat > start-oskarlink.sh <<'SH'
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail

ts() {
  date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"
}

log() {
  printf '[%s] [OskarLink] [%s] %s\n' "$(ts)" "$1" "$2"
}

profile="${OSKARLINK_PROFILE:-balanced}"
prestart_checks="${OSKARLINK_PRESTART_CHECKS:-true}"
max_ram="${OSKARLINK_JAVA_MAX_RAM:-95.0}"
initial_ram="${OSKARLINK_JAVA_INITIAL_RAM:-25.0}"
extra_flags="${OSKARLINK_EXTRA_JAVA_FLAGS:-}"

log BOOT "OskarLink startup sequence initialized"
log INFO "Profile: ${profile}"
log INFO "Working directory: $(pwd)"
log INFO "Java MaxRAMPercentage: ${max_ram}"
log INFO "Java InitialRAMPercentage: ${initial_ram}"

if [ "${prestart_checks}" = "true" ]; then
  log INFO "Running preflight checks"

  if [ ! -s OskarLink.jar ]; then
    log ERROR "OskarLink.jar is missing or empty"
    exit 20
  fi
  log OK "Found OskarLink.jar"

  if [ ! -s application.yml ]; then
    log ERROR "application.yml is missing or empty"
    exit 21
  fi
  log OK "Found application.yml"

  java_version="$(java -version 2>&1 | head -n 1 || true)"
  if [ -z "${java_version}" ]; then
    log ERROR "Java is not available"
    exit 22
  fi
  log OK "Java runtime: ${java_version}"

  plugin_count="$(grep -c '^[[:space:]]*- dependency:' application.yml 2>/dev/null || true)"
  log INFO "Configured plugin dependencies: ${plugin_count:-0}"

  if [ -x ./bin/yt-dlp ]; then
    ytdlp_version="$(./bin/yt-dlp --version 2>/dev/null || true)"
    log OK "yt-dlp helper: ${ytdlp_version:-installed}"
  elif command -v yt-dlp >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    ytdlp_version="$(yt-dlp --version 2>/dev/null || true)"
    log OK "yt-dlp from PATH: ${ytdlp_version:-installed}"
  else
    log WARN "yt-dlp was not found; broad URL sources will be limited"
  fi

  if grep -qi 'PulseLink' application.yml; then
    log WARN "PulseLink reference detected; this distribution rejects PulseLink for lavaclient compatibility"
  fi
else
  log WARN "Preflight checks are disabled"
fi

log BOOT "Handing off to Lavalink runtime"

cmd=(java "-XX:MaxRAMPercentage=${max_ram}" "-XX:InitialRAMPercentage=${initial_ram}")
if [ -n "${extra_flags}" ]; then
  # shellcheck disable=SC2206
  extra=(${extra_flags})
  cmd+=("${extra[@]}")
fi
cmd+=(-jar OskarLink.jar "$@")

exec "${cmd[@]}"
SH
chmod +x start-oskarlink.sh

printf '%s\n' '[OskarLink] Installation completed'

variables.name: Lavalink Version
variables.description: Pinned Lavalink release tag. Use latest only after testing plugin compatibility.

variables.name: OskarLink Raw Base URL
variables.description: Optional raw GitHub base URL, for example https://raw.githubusercontent.com/KaivskyDev/oskarlink/main.

variables.name: OskarLink Config URL
variables.description: Optional direct URL to application.yml. Overrides OSKARLINK_RAW_BASE_URL.

variables.name: OskarLink Jar URL
variables.description: Optional direct custom jar URL. Leave empty to download Lavalink release.

variables.name: Clean Plugin Jars
variables.description: Deletes stale plugin jars during install.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: Compatibility variable for generic Java startup commands. OskarLink installs this file as OskarLink.jar.

variables.name: OskarLink Profile
variables.description: Startup/calibration profile printed by the OskarLink launcher.

variables.name: OskarLink Prestart Checks
variables.description: Runs English startup preflight checks before Lavalink starts.

variables.name: Extra Java Flags
variables.description: Optional extra JVM flags appended by start-oskarlink.sh.

variables.name: Lavalink Password
variables.description: Authorization password used by your bot client.

variables.name: Music Country
variables.description: Country code used by source APIs.

variables.name: Spotify sp_dc
variables.description: Spotify sp_dc cookie. Use a separate account.

variables.name: Enable Deezer
variables.description: Enables Deezer. Requires master key and ARL.

variables.name: VK User Token
variables.description: VK user token. Use a separate account.
